tasks.label: Build Bank Queue Simulation
tasks.command: if (Test-Path out) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force out }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path out | Out-Null; javac -d out (Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.java src | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })

tasks.label: Run Bank Queue Simulation Task
tasks.command: if (Test-Path out) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force out }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path out | Out-Null; javac -d out (Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.java src | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }); java -cp out app.Main
